metadata.description: Engineering guidelines and best practices for software development

plugins.name: guideline
plugins.description: Software engineering guidelines and coding principles — including RESTful API guidelines and Andrej Karpathy's 11 coding principles

plugins.name: workflow
plugins.description: Orchestrated developer workflow skills — including init, idea, feature, develop, and planning for rigorous software engineering

plugins.name: docs
plugins.description: Documentation decision records — ADR (Nygard format) and MADR (MADR 4.0) for architecture decisions

plugins.name: git
plugins.description: Git workflow skills — safe commit, Korean PR creation, PR review with host-aware peer cross-check, squash merge, issue creation, full PR lifecycle orchestration, and worktree cleanup

plugins.name: llm
plugins.description: LLM delegation skills — agy (Antigravity CLI) context map, claude advanced reasoning, and auto bidirectional crosscheck

plugins.name: dev
plugins.description: Development methodology skills — Tidy First, TDD, and language-agnostic development practices
